segment.source: A two-column conversion section pairing a headline, rich-text body, and one button with a single supporting image placed left or right. Use it for: promotional passages that combine a photo with a clear action, offers a visual makes concrete, mid-page conversion breaks on landing and feature pages. Prefer 'Call to Action' for text-only prompts; use 'Split Text & Media' when the passage is editorial rather than conversion-driven.
